// Generated by Capy — AArch64 (ARM64) Linux.
// Build:  aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc -nostdlib -static hello.s -o hello
.data
hello:
    .ascii "Hello, world\n"

.text
.global _start
_start:
mov x8, #64               // syscall: write
mov x0, #1        // arg0: fd
adr x1, hello        // arg1: buffer
mov x2, #13       // arg2: count
svc #0
mov x8, #93               // syscall: exit
mov x0, #0      // arg0: status code
svc #0
